title: SendGrid Authorized Sender Email Configuration
description:
Audit and verify that the application only sends emails from authorized SendGrid sender addresses. At the time of this ticket, only two email addresses were authorized for sending: support@datatoolspro.com and info@datatoolspro.com.

Staging was configured to send from support@datatoolspro.com while production used info@datatoolspro.com. The goal was to confirm no other unauthorized sender addresses were being used.
acceptance_criteria: Application only sends emails from authorized SendGrid sender addresses
Staging environment uses support@datatoolspro.com as the from address
Production environment uses info@datatoolspro.com as the from address
No emails are sent from unauthorized addresses
middleware_changes: Verified and corrected sender email addresses in the email service configuration to match SendGrid authorized senders per environment.
implementation_notes: Staging uses support@datatoolspro.com; production uses info@datatoolspro.com. Both are the only authorized SendGrid sender addresses.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the from email addresses in staging and production environments matched the authorized SendGrid senders.
